name: branch-eevee
description: Eevee (#133) branch evolution — 3 eligible branches in the data (Vaporeon/Jolteon/Flareon via stones). All 3 fit as buttons alongside Refuse (4 options total, no overflow). Cross-gen data path: Eevee is gen1-only, so this also exercises the cross-gen ensurePokemonInDB fallback when the save is on gen4+.
